original_abstract: The Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe (SHARE) is an international research initiative established to address the complex societal challenges posed by a rapidly ageing population. By investigating how Europeans navigate the transitions of later life, the project explores critical questions regarding economic stability, social integration, and physical well-being, as well as the intricate intersections between these domains. In this multidisciplinary volume, the authors leverage the latest SHARE data to provide deep insights into the ageing process, offering a rigorous evidence base to inform policies aimed at fostering a more resilient and inclusive society.
humanized_abstract: The Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe (SHARE) is a multidisciplinary and comparative longitudinal project which was designed to explore the challenges with a rapidly ageing population in Europe. Via an inquiry of how Europeans manage the changes of later life, the project investigates and sheds light on numerous key aspects related to the economic, social and health aspects of ageing and their interrelations. This handbook contains first of all based on SHARE a series of analyses which shed light to the processes of ageing within European societies, and thus can serve as an important basis for the development of successful policies guaranteeing high levels of social, economic and health security in the ageing societies.
